title: jasminum kerrii
intro: Jasminum kerrii, also known as the pink jasmine or golden jasmine, is a flowering vine native to Southeast Asia and China, characterized by its golden yellow flowers with pink or white markings and its sweet, intense fragrance. The leaves and flowers of the Jasminum kerrii plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Jasminum kerrii include its ability to reduce stress, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Jasminum kerrii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in aromatherapy to harness its therapeutic benefits.
